---
title: "Harmonic Oscillator Erasure Density"
output:
  github_document: default
---

```{r setup-and-data, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggforce)
library(patchwork)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(ggrepel) 


# --- 1. Configuration & Data Load ---
# Strict Prefix Naming: dir_ (Directory), file_ (File Path), dt_ (DataTable)

dir_base_data_4TB <- "/Volumes/SanDisk4TB/SternBrocot-data"

# --- 1.2 Display Configuration ---
config_min_node_count <- 0
config_max_node_count <- 30
config_min_momentum <- 0.5
config_max_momentum <- 10

# Pipeline Directories
dir_01_raw_erasures           <- file.path(dir_base_data_4TB, "01_harmonic_oscillator_erasures")
dir_02_densities              <- file.path(dir_base_data_4TB, "02_harmonic_oscillator_densities")
dir_03_nodes                  <- file.path(dir_base_data_4TB, "03_harmonic_oscillator_nodes")
dir_04_summary                <- file.path(dir_base_data_4TB, "04_harmonic_oscillator_summary")

# Summary Files
file_04_summary_erasure_distance       <- file.path(dir_04_summary, "harmonic_oscillator_erasure_distance_summary.csv.gz")
file_04_summary_minimal_action_state   <- file.path(dir_04_summary, "harmonic_oscillator_minimal_action_state_summary.csv.gz")
file_04_summary_minimal_program_length <- file.path(dir_04_summary, "harmonic_oscillator_minimal_program_length_summary.csv.gz")
file_04_summary_resonance_margin <- file.path(dir_04_summary, "harmonic_oscillator_resonance_margin_summary.csv.gz")

if (!file.exists(file_04_summary_erasure_distance)) {
  stop("Erasure Distance Summary file not found at: ", file_04_summary_erasure_distance)
}

# In-Memory Data Tables
dt_summary_erasure_distance <- if (file.exists(file_04_summary_erasure_distance)) fread(file_04_summary_erasure_distance) else data.table()
dt_summary_minimal_action_state <- if (file.exists(file_04_summary_minimal_action_state)) fread(file_04_summary_minimal_action_state) else data.table()
dt_summary_minimal_program_length <- if (file.exists(file_04_summary_minimal_program_length)) fread(file_04_summary_minimal_program_length) else data.table()
dt_summary_resonance_margin <- if (file.exists(file_04_summary_resonance_margin)) fread(file_04_summary_resonance_margin) else data.table()

# --- 1.5 Physics Constants ---
# Zero-Point Energy offset for the Quantum Harmonic Oscillator.
# P^2 = n + 0.5  =>  n = P^2 - 0.5
qho_zpe_offset <- 0.0

# --- 2. Auto-Selection Logic (Erasure Distance) ---

# Extract the EXACT P = 0.500 baseline from the RAW data (before NA filtering)
row_0500 <- copy(dt_summary_erasure_distance[abs(normalized_momentum - 0.500) < 1e-4])
if (nrow(row_0500) > 0) {
  row_0500 <- row_0500[1]
  row_0500[, node_count := 0] # Force n=0 so it plots correctly
  if ("snr_metric" %in% names(row_0500)) row_0500[, snr_metric := 0]
}

# Filter to valid macroscopic states
valid_summaries <- dt_summary_erasure_distance[!is.na(node_count) & node_count >= 0]

# SELECTION A: Closest to Theoretical Parabola
idx_closest_parabola <- valid_summaries[, .I[which.min(abs(normalized_momentum - sqrt(node_count + qho_zpe_offset)))], by = node_count]$V1
dt_parabola_picked <- valid_summaries[idx_closest_parabola]
dt_parabola_picked <- dt_parabola_picked[node_count != 0] # Strip the algorithm's noisy n=0 pick
if(nrow(row_0500) > 0) dt_parabola_picked <- rbind(dt_parabola_picked, row_0500, fill = TRUE) # Force exactly 0.500
setorder(dt_parabola_picked, node_count)
dt_selected_parabola <- dt_parabola_picked[node_count >= config_min_node_count & node_count <= config_max_node_count & normalized_momentum >= config_min_momentum & normalized_momentum <= config_max_momentum]

# --- Auto-Selection Logic (Minimal Action State) ---

if (exists("dt_summary_minimal_action_state") && nrow(dt_summary_minimal_action_state) > 0) {
  
  row_0500_action <- copy(dt_summary_minimal_action_state[abs(normalized_momentum - 0.500) < 1e-4])
  if (nrow(row_0500_action) > 0) {
    row_0500_action <- row_0500_action[1]
    row_0500_action[, node_count := 0]
    if ("snr_metric" %in% names(row_0500_action)) row_0500_action[, snr_metric := 0]
  }
  
  valid_summaries_action <- dt_summary_minimal_action_state[!is.na(node_count) & node_count >= 0]
  
  # SELECTION A: Parabola
  idx_closest_parabola_action <- valid_summaries_action[, .I[which.min(abs(normalized_momentum - sqrt(node_count + qho_zpe_offset)))], by = node_count]$V1
  dt_parabola_picked_action <- valid_summaries_action[idx_closest_parabola_action]
  dt_parabola_picked_action <- dt_parabola_picked_action[node_count != 0]
  if(nrow(row_0500_action) > 0) dt_parabola_picked_action <- rbind(dt_parabola_picked_action, row_0500_action, fill = TRUE)
  setorder(dt_parabola_picked_action, node_count)
  dt_selected_minimal_action_parabola <- dt_parabola_picked_action[node_count >= config_min_node_count & node_count <= config_max_node_count & normalized_momentum >= config_min_momentum & normalized_momentum <= config_max_momentum]
  
  # SELECTION B: Textbook (SNR)
  if("snr_metric" %in% names(valid_summaries_action)) {
    idx_textbook_action <- valid_summaries_action[, .I[which.max(snr_metric)], by = node_count]$V1
  } else {
    idx_textbook_action <- idx_closest_parabola_action
  }
  dt_textbook_picked_action <- valid_summaries_action[idx_textbook_action]
  dt_textbook_picked_action <- dt_textbook_picked_action[node_count != 0]
  if(nrow(row_0500_action) > 0) dt_textbook_picked_action <- rbind(dt_textbook_picked_action, row_0500_action, fill = TRUE)
  setorder(dt_textbook_picked_action, node_count)
  dt_selected_minimal_action_textbook <- dt_textbook_picked_action[node_count >= config_min_node_count & node_count <= config_max_node_count & normalized_momentum >= config_min_momentum & normalized_momentum <= config_max_momentum]
}

# --- 3. Dynamic Plot Sizing ---
# Adjusted the height multiplier down to 4.0 to eliminate top/bottom white space
dynamic_height_parabola <- max(5, nrow(dt_selected_parabola) * 4.0 + 1)
```

```{r plot-2A-overview-scatter-erasure-distance, echo=FALSE, results='asis', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=12, fig.height=8}
# --- Plot 2A: Overview Scatter Plot (Erasure Distance) ---
qho_backbone <- function(P) { P^2 - qho_zpe_offset }

if(nrow(dt_summary_erasure_distance) > 0) {
  # FILTER STRICTLY: Only pull background data that strictly respects the configured boundaries
  dt_background_erasure_distance <- dt_summary_erasure_distance[
    !is.na(node_count) & 
    node_count >= config_min_node_count & 
    node_count <= config_max_node_count & 
    normalized_momentum >= config_min_momentum &
    normalized_momentum <= config_max_momentum
  ]
  
  # Compute local relative SNR (percentile rank within each node_count)
  dt_background_erasure_distance[, snr_relative := frank(snr_metric, ties.method = "average") / .N, by = node_count]
  
  p_ov_action_a <- ggplot() +
    stat_function(fun = qho_backbone, 
                  n = 1001, color = "black", linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.5, linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_point(data = dt_background_erasure_distance[order(snr_relative)], 
               aes(x = normalized_momentum, y = node_count, color = snr_relative), 
               size = 1.5, alpha = 1.0) +
    # Strictly Grayscale gradient for background points
    scale_color_gradient(low = "black", high = "grey85", name = "Local SNR\n(Percentile)") +  
    
    # 2. Plot Parabola Selections (Circle, Shape 21, Solid Black)
    # Plotted second so they sit clearly on top
    geom_point(data = dt_selected_parabola, aes(x = normalized_momentum, y = node_count, shape = "Parabola Fit"), 
               color = "black", size = 5.5, fill = NA, stroke = 1.2) +
               
    # Grayscale Shape Legend
    scale_shape_manual(name = "Selection Method", values = c("Parabola Fit" = 21, "Max Local SNR" = 22)) +
    
    # Text Callouts (Using Parabola data)
    geom_text(data = dt_selected_parabola, aes(x = normalized_momentum, y = node_count, 
              label = sprintf("n=%d P=%.3f snr=%.1f", node_count, normalized_momentum, snr_metric)),
              nudge_y = config_max_node_count * 0.015, 
              size = 3, color = "black", fontface = "bold", family = "mono") +
              
    # Axis Configurations
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(ceiling(config_min_momentum), floor(config_max_momentum), by = 1)) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(config_min_node_count, config_max_node_count, by = 5)) +
    
    labs(title = "Node Count vs Momentum: Erasure Distance",
         subtitle = sprintf("Continuous phase-space evolution from P=%g to %g and n=%d to %d", config_min_momentum, config_max_momentum, config_min_node_count, config_max_node_count),
         x = "Normalized Momentum (P)", y = "Nodes (n)") +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(config_min_momentum, config_max_momentum), ylim = c(config_min_node_count - 0.5, config_max_node_count)) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14))
  
  print(p_ov_action_a)
  cat("\n\n---\n\n")
}
```

```{r plot-3-program-length-evolution, echo=FALSE, results='asis', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=12, fig.height=7}
# --- Plot 3: Program Length Summary ---
if (nrow(dt_summary_minimal_program_length) > 0) {
  
  dt_filtered_prog_len <- dt_summary_minimal_program_length[
    normalized_momentum >= config_min_momentum & 
    normalized_momentum <= config_max_momentum
  ]
  
  p_prog <- ggplot(dt_filtered_prog_len, aes(x = normalized_momentum)) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), fill = "grey80", alpha = 0.6) +
    geom_line(aes(y = mean_len, color = "Mean"), linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1.0) +
    geom_step(aes(y = median_len, color = "Median"), linewidth = 1.2) +
    scale_color_manual(name = "Metric", values = c("Mean" = "gray30", "Median" = "black")) +
    
    # Force Explicit Integer Axes
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(ceiling(config_min_momentum), floor(config_max_momentum), by = 1)) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 12, by = 1)) +
    
    labs(title = "Algorithmic Complexity",
         subtitle = "Mean, Median, and ±1 Standard Deviation of Minimal Program Length over Momentum",
         x = "Normalized Momentum (P)", 
         y = "Minimal Program Length (bits)") +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(config_min_momentum, config_max_momentum)) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(family = "mono", face = "bold", size = 16),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12, color = "gray40"),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
    )
  
  print(p_prog)
  cat("\n\n---\n\n")
  
} else {
  cat("*(Program length summary data not yet generated)*\n\n---\n\n")
}
```

```{r plot-4-correspondence-limit, echo=FALSE, results='asis', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=12, fig.height=7}
# --- Plot 4: Thermodynamic Correspondence Limit (Geometric Slack) ---

# Check if the standalone summary table loaded successfully and has data
if (nrow(dt_summary_resonance_margin) > 0) {
  
  dt_filtered_res <- dt_summary_resonance_margin[
    normalized_momentum >= config_min_momentum & 
    normalized_momentum <= config_max_momentum
  ]
  
  p_res <- ggplot(dt_filtered_res, aes(x = normalized_momentum)) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower_residual, ymax = upper_residual), fill = "grey80", alpha = 0.6) +
    geom_line(aes(y = mean_residual, color = "Mean"), linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1.0) +
    geom_step(aes(y = median_residual, color = "Median"), linewidth = 1.2) +
    scale_color_manual(name = "Metric", values = c("Mean" = "gray30", "Median" = "black")) +
    
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(ceiling(config_min_momentum), floor(config_max_momentum), by = 1)) +
    
    labs(title = "Thermodynamic Correspondence Limit",
         subtitle = expression(paste("Ensemble average of unspent phase-space capacity (", delta, "q - |", epsilon[q], "|) demonstrating classical smoothing")),
         x = "Normalized Momentum (P)", 
         y = expression(paste("Geometric Slack  ", delta, "q - |", epsilon[q], "|"))) +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(config_min_momentum, config_max_momentum)) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(family = "mono", face = "bold", size = 16),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12, color = "gray40"),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
    )
  
  print(p_res)
  cat("\n\n---\n\n")
  
} else {
  cat("*(Correspondence limit summary data not yet generated)*\n\n---\n\n")
}
```

```{r setup-plotting-functions, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# --- Function: Render Combined Erasure Distance Grid ---
render_combined_erasure_distance_grid <- function(dt_target_momenta, custom_title) {
  plot_list <- list()
  
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(dt_target_momenta))) {
    current_row <- dt_target_momenta[i]
    momentum_val <- current_row$normalized_momentum
    momentum_str_padded <- sprintf("%013.6f", momentum_val)
    
    # PRE-LOAD THE DENSITY FILE to get the exact number of minimal action states (bins)
    file_density_erasure_distance <- file.path(dir_02_densities, sprintf("harmonic_oscillator_erasure_distance_density_P_%s.csv.gz", momentum_str_padded))
    dt_histogram_points <- data.table()
    n_bins_text <- ""
    
    if (file.exists(file_density_erasure_distance)) {
      dt_histogram_points <- fread(file_density_erasure_distance)
      if (nrow(dt_histogram_points) > 0) {
        n_bins_text <- sprintf("\nbins = %d", nrow(dt_histogram_points))
      }
    }
    
    # ---------------------------------------------------------
    # 1. Conjugate Quanta (Left Column)
    # ---------------------------------------------------------
    a_base <- momentum_val / 0.5
    b_base <- 0.5 / momentum_val
    scaling_factor <- 90 / max(a_base, b_base) 
    
    ellipse_df <- data.frame(
      type = factor(c("Q-Conjugate", "P-Conjugate"), levels = c("Q-Conjugate", "P-Conjugate")),
      major = c(a_base, b_base) * scaling_factor,
      minor = c(b_base, a_base) * scaling_factor
    )
    
    p_ell <- ggplot(ellipse_df) +
      geom_ellipse(aes(x0 = 0, y0 = 0, a = major, b = minor, angle = 0, color = type, fill = type), 
                   alpha = 0.2, linewidth = 0.5) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = c("Q-Conjugate" = "black", "P-Conjugate" = "gray60")) +
      scale_color_manual(values = c("Q-Conjugate" = "black", "P-Conjugate" = "gray30")) +
      coord_fixed(xlim = c(-100, 100), ylim = c(-100, 100)) +
      
      # INJECTING THE NUMBER OF BINS INTO THE Y-AXIS LABEL
      labs(y = sprintf("P = %.3f\nn = %d%s", momentum_val, current_row$node_count, n_bins_text)) +
      
      theme_minimal() + 
      theme(legend.position = "none",
            axis.title.x = element_blank(), 
            axis.title.y = element_text(angle = 0, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1, face = "bold", size = 12, margin = margin(r = 15)), 
            axis.text = element_blank(),
            panel.grid = element_line(color = "gray90"),
            aspect.ratio = 1,
            plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5))
    
    if (i == 1) p_ell <- p_ell + labs(title = "Conjugate Blobs") + 
        theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 14))
    
    # ---------------------------------------------------------
    # 2. Microstate vs. minimal_action_state (Middle Column)
    # ---------------------------------------------------------
    file_raw_erasures <- file.path(dir_01_raw_erasures, sprintf("harmonic_oscillator_erasures_P_%s.csv.gz", momentum_str_padded))
    p_scat <- ggplot() + theme_void() + theme(aspect.ratio = 1, plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5)) 
    
    if (file.exists(file_raw_erasures)) {
      dt_raw_found <- fread(file_raw_erasures)[found == 1]
      if (nrow(dt_raw_found) > 0) {
        p_scat <- ggplot(dt_raw_found, aes(x = microstate, y = minimal_action_state)) +
          geom_point(alpha = 0.25, size = 0.1, color = "black") + 
          theme_minimal() +
          theme(axis.title = element_blank(), 
                axis.text = element_blank(),
                panel.grid = element_line(color = "gray90"),
                aspect.ratio = 1,
                plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5))
      }
    }
    if (i == 1) p_scat <- p_scat + labs(title = "Minimal Action State vs. Microstate") + 
        theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 14))
    
    # ---------------------------------------------------------
    # 3. Coordinate Density (Right Column)
    # ---------------------------------------------------------
    file_nodes_erasure_distance <- file.path(dir_03_nodes, sprintf("harmonic_oscillator_erasure_distance_nodes_P_%s.csv.gz", momentum_str_padded))
    p_den <- ggplot() + theme_void() + theme(aspect.ratio = 1, plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5))
    
    if (nrow(dt_histogram_points) > 0) {
      dt_active_bins <- copy(dt_histogram_points) # Do not drop 0-count bins to preserve skyline shape
      
      max_density_height <- max(dt_active_bins$density_count, na.rm = TRUE)
      if (max_density_height == 0) max_density_height <- 1 # Prevent division by zero
      
      raw_coordinate_width <- if(nrow(dt_active_bins) > 1) median(diff(dt_active_bins$coordinate_q), na.rm=TRUE) else 1.0
      max_coordinate_edge <- max(abs(dt_active_bins$coordinate_q), na.rm = TRUE) + (raw_coordinate_width / 2)
      if (max_coordinate_edge == 0) max_coordinate_edge <- 1
      
      dt_active_bins[, c("pct_density", "pct_q") := list((density_count/max_density_height)*100, (coordinate_q/max_coordinate_edge)*100)]
      pct_bar_width <- (raw_coordinate_width / max_coordinate_edge) * 100
      
      # --- TRUE SKYLINE PATH LOGIC ---
      # Build exact geometric perimeter without trailing zero-lines
      skyline_x <- c(dt_active_bins$pct_q[1] - pct_bar_width/2, 
                     rep(dt_active_bins$pct_q, each = 2) + rep(c(-pct_bar_width/2, pct_bar_width/2), nrow(dt_active_bins)), 
                     dt_active_bins$pct_q[nrow(dt_active_bins)] + pct_bar_width/2)
      
      skyline_y <- c(0, rep(dt_active_bins$pct_density, each = 2), 0)
      
      dt_skyline_outline <- data.table::data.table(pct_q = skyline_x, pct_density = skyline_y)
      
      dt_node_coordinates <- if(file.exists(file_nodes_erasure_distance)) fread(file_nodes_erasure_distance) else data.table()
      if (nrow(dt_node_coordinates) > 0 && "coordinate_q" %in% names(dt_node_coordinates)) {
        dt_node_coordinates[, c("pct_density", "pct_q") := list((density_count/max_density_height)*100, (coordinate_q/max_coordinate_edge)*100)]
      }
      
      p_den <- ggplot() +
        geom_col(data = dt_active_bins, aes(x = pct_q, y = pct_density), width = pct_bar_width, fill = "gray85") +
        geom_path(data = dt_skyline_outline, aes(x = pct_q, y = pct_density), color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) + 
        geom_point(data = dt_node_coordinates, aes(x = pct_q, y = pct_density), color = "black", size = 1.5) +
        coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-100, 100), ylim = c(0, 105)) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(axis.title = element_blank(), 
              axis.text = element_blank(),
              panel.grid = element_line(color = "gray90"),
              aspect.ratio = 1,
              plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5))
    }
    
    if (i == 1) p_den <- p_den + labs(title = "Erasure Density") + 
        theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 14))
    
    # ---------------------------------------------------------
    # 4. Append row to Master List
    # ---------------------------------------------------------
    plot_list[[length(plot_list) + 1]] <- p_ell
    plot_list[[length(plot_list) + 1]] <- p_scat
    plot_list[[length(plot_list) + 1]] <- p_den
  }
  
  # ---------------------------------------------------------
  # Assemble into Final Matrix using Patchwork
  # ---------------------------------------------------------
  final_grid <- wrap_plots(plot_list, ncol = 3) +
    plot_annotation(
      title = custom_title,
      theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, family = "mono"),
                    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5, color = "gray30"))
    )
  
  if(nrow(dt_target_momenta) > 0) print(final_grid)
}
```

```{r plot-1A-grid-parabola, echo=FALSE, fig.width=14, fig.height=dynamic_height_parabola, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# --- Plot 1A: Erasure Distance Grid (Theoretical Parabola) ---
render_combined_erasure_distance_grid(dt_selected_parabola, "Harmonic Oscillator Erasure Density (Theoretical Parabola)")
```

```{r generate_tree}
# Function to generate the extended Stern-Brocot tree up to max_depth
generate_tree <- function(max_depth) {
  nodes <- list(
    list(
      depth = 0, num = 0, den = 1,
      l_num = -1, l_den = 0, r_num = 1, r_den = 0,
      bin = "", parent_x = NA_real_, parent_y = NA_real_
    )
  )
  
  all_nodes <- nodes
  
  for (d in 1:max_depth) {
    new_nodes <- list()
    for (node in nodes) {
      left_node <- list(
        depth = d, num = node$l_num + node$num, den = node$l_den + node$den,
        l_num = node$l_num, l_den = node$l_den, r_num = node$num, r_den = node$den,
        bin = paste0(node$bin, "0"), parent_x = node$num / node$den, parent_y = node$depth
      )
      right_node <- list(
        depth = d, num = node$num + node$r_num, den = node$den + node$r_den,
        l_num = node$num, l_den = node$den, r_num = node$r_num, r_den = node$r_den,
        bin = paste0(node$bin, "1"), parent_x = node$num / node$den, parent_y = node$depth
      )
      new_nodes <- append(new_nodes, list(left_node, right_node))
    }
    all_nodes <- append(all_nodes, new_nodes)
    nodes <- new_nodes
  }
  
  df <- bind_rows(all_nodes) %>%
    mutate(
      x = num / den,
      y = depth,
      frac_label = paste0(num, "/", den),
      bin_label = ifelse(bin == "", "(zero bits)", bin)
    )
  
  return(df)
}

max_k <- 4
tree_data <- generate_tree(max_k)
```

```{r plot_tree, fig.width=14, fig.height=8, dpi=300}
ggplot(tree_data, aes(x = x, y = y)) +
  # Edges: Thicker and darker to emphasize the actual tree structure
  geom_segment(
    aes(xend = parent_x, yend = parent_y), 
    color = "gray40", 
    linewidth = 0.8,
    na.rm = TRUE  # Silences the NA warning for the root node
  ) +
  
  # Points
  geom_point(color = "black", size = 2) +
  
  # Top Labels: Fractions ABOVE the points
  geom_label_repel(
    aes(label = frac_label),
    direction = "x",          # <--- Changed to "x" to only repel horizontally
    nudge_y = 0.15,           # Locks the vertical push UP
    segment.color = "gray85", 
    segment.size = 0.2,       
    size = 3.5,
    color = "black",
    fill = "white",           # Opaque background
    label.size = NA,          # Removes the box border
    label.padding = unit(0.15, "lines"),
    vjust = 0,                # Anchors bottom of text block
    box.padding = 0.1,       
    max.overlaps = Inf       
  ) +
  
  # Bottom Labels: Binary strings BELOW the points
  geom_label_repel(
    aes(label = bin_label),
    direction = "x",          # <--- Changed to "x" to only repel horizontally
    nudge_y = -0.15,          # Locks the vertical push DOWN
    segment.color = "gray85", 
    segment.size = 0.2,       
    size = 3.5,
    family = "mono",          # Fixed-width font for info theory look
    color = "black",
    fill = "white",           
    label.size = NA,          
    label.padding = unit(0.15, "lines"),
    vjust = 1,                # Anchors top of text block
    box.padding = 0.1,       
    max.overlaps = Inf       
  ) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = 0:max_k, 
    limits = c(-0.3, max_k + 0.3), 
    name = "Kolmogorov Complexity (K)"
  ) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = -4:4, 
    name = "Coordinate (q)",
    expand = expansion(mult = 0.05) 
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray90"),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12, color = "gray30"),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Extended Stern-Brocot Tree (-Inf to +Inf)",
    subtitle = "Tree depth is Kolmogorov Complexity"
  )
```
